text.title: RAG Bench Harness Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from corpus snapshot to leaderboard artefact.

step.name: snapshot-corpus
step.action: Snapshot to warehouse path; pin sha + doc_count.

step.name: pin-query-set
step.action: Commit query set with gold labels to git. Reject if labels missing.

step.name: pin-runners
step.action: For each runner: pin name + version + config_hash.

step.name: select-metrics
step.action: Pick metrics: Recall@k + MRR for retrieval; add faithfulness + answer-relevancy for end-to-end.
